examples: Mixed cresol resin can meet the requirements of anti-alkaline of film-forming resin.
Phenol and cresol isomers could be well separated in liquid crystal PBOB packed column.
The adsorption capacity of phenol, aniline, m-cresol and AO7 on ACFs can also be effectively enhanced by electrochemical polarization.
